name: Sufoof Joshanda | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
composition:
Each 2 gm contains powder of the following herbs:

Glycyrrhiza glabra: 0.536 gm
Cordia dichotama: 0.536 gm
Althaea officinalis: 0.214 gm
Malva sylvetris: 0.284 gm
Viola odorata: 0.180 gm
Borago officinalis: 0.142 gm
Zizyphus jujuba: 0.108 gm
pharmacology: Sufoof Joshanda is an effective cough expectorant. Josh acts as a bronchodilator. It normalizes the respiratory tract, improves the functions of the lungs and relieves chest congestion due to cough. It also treats headache.
dosage__administration: Mix 02 teaspoonful Josh (5 gm) or total powder of each sachet in one cup hot water twice daily or as prescribed by the Physician.
contraindications: There is no evidence available on contraindication but it may happen in patients who are hypersensitive to any of its ingredients.
side_effects: No Known side effects with unani preparation Sufoof Joshanda.
pregnancy__lactation: Unani medicine Josh is safe for pregnant woman. It does not cause any problem during pregnancy and lactation.
storage_conditions: Store in a cool & dry place, protect from light. Keep out of the reach of the children.
